title: 如何看待泽连斯基签署法案宣布”俄罗斯南部部分地区是乌克兰的自古以来的领土”？
meta_description: 如何看待泽连斯基签署法案宣布”俄罗斯南部部分地区是乌克兰的自古以来的领土”？ - [url=https://www.newsweek.com/volodymyr-zelensky-decree-historical-lands-ukraine-russia-1862758]link[/url] Ukraine will put in p...
meta_keywords: 看待,泽连,斯基,签署,法案,宣布,俄罗斯,南部,部分地区,乌克兰,自古以来,领土
contents:
link
Ukraine will put in place new measures to safeguard the "national identity of Ukrainians" living in Russia, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Monday, hitting at the heart of Moscow and Kyiv's competing claims on identity and territory.

The decree lists several regions of Russia as "historically inhabited by Ukrainians," including the border regions of Bryansk, Kursk and Belgorod, and Russia's Rostov and Southern Krasnodar region, from which Moscow has launched attacks on Ukraine and which is linked to the annexed Crimean peninsula via the key Kerch Bridge.
